case_title: BALWANT D THAKOR VS. JOHN BRAXTON et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THAKOR, BALWANT D RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRAXTON, JOHN DODD, MERCIE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 445 O'FARRELL ST. #318, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94102-2009, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (AMENDED COURT JUDGMENT FILED 6/3/09)
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT BRAXTON, JOHN
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $26.67 PER DAY FILED BY PLAINTIFF THAKOR, BALWANT D
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT BRAXTON, JOHN
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THAKOR, BALWANT D AS TO DEFENDANT BRAXTON, JOHN DODD, MERCIE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF THAKOR, BALWANT D
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF THAKOR, BALWANT D SERVED DEC-29-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DODD, MERCIE
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF THAKOR, BALWANT D SERVED DEC-29-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BRAXTON, JOHN
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $265.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT BRAXTON, JOHN DODD, MERCIE
DECLARATION FOR DEFAULT JUDGMENT BY COURT (CCP 585(D)) FILED BY PLAINTIFF THAKOR, BALWANT D
REQUEST FOR COURT JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $405.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (FOR COURT JUDGMENT) AS TO DEFENDANT BRAXTON, JOHN DODD, MERCIE

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THAKOR, BALWANT D RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRAXTON, JOHN DODD, MERCIE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: PREMISES RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF ON 1/28/09 $740.00 RENT, $405.00 COSTS, $720.00 HOLDOVER DAMAGES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,865.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
